summary: Executed backend pytest and frontend Playwright regression on public URL for live-only intelligence + LLM dashboard behavior. Core dashboard/comparison/chat flows work under longer latency, but product channel visibility and live-source channel reliability have gaps.

critical.issue: Crustdata web-search and web-fetch calls return 403 Forbidden in backend logs, so news/product channels are frequently empty even for known competitors.

minor.issue: For empty competitors, strategic_summary can be overwritten by generic summary text (e.g., suggests hiring focus) despite zero hiring/news/social metrics.

ui_bugs.issue: No Product Changes panel/empty state is rendered, so live-only empty state requirement is not represented for product channel.

integration_issues.issue: News and product channels remain empty largely due upstream 403s from Crustdata web-search/web-fetch, not just true no-data cases.

action_items: Add product changes section on dashboard with explicit empty-state messaging and data-testid coverage.
Fix Crustdata permissions/endpoint contract for /screener/web-search and /screener/web-fetch to restore live news/product ingestion.
Keep empty-company strategic_summary consistent with zero-data state (do not overwrite with inferred hiring focus text).
critical_code_review_comments: Live source status is correctly returned in source_status, but competitor-level source metadata is omitted from response model; if UI needs per-company provenance details, include explicit fields in response schema.
_build_company_summary currently runs for all companies, including empty payloads, causing contradictory strategic text in zero-data scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests now include live-source status, AI live indicator, and empty-channel checks for unknown competitors. Frontend validated processing latency, dashboard result rendering, comparison and chat flows. Verify product channel UI after implementation and re-check Crustdata 403 resolution.
rca of the issue: RCA-1: Product/news emptiness is mainly from upstream authorization failures (Crustdata 403 on /screener/web-search and /screener/web-fetch), visible in backend.err.log. RCA-2: Missing product empty-state UI is a frontend coverage gap (no product card/testid). RCA-3: Empty-company strategic summary inconsistency comes from orchestrator applying _build_company_summary after _empty_company_payload generation.
